justification: The diff correctly updates the Java version to 21 and migrates javax.* imports to jakarta.* (e.g., Pedido.java, CustomExceptionHandler.java), while removing deprecated @Autowired annotations in favor of constructor injection. However, it introduces significant spurious churn by including build artifacts (target/ directories, jacoco.xml, maven-status files) and modifying application.properties with hardcoded credentials, which should not be part of a migration diff.
